query:
INSERT INTO complementGroups (productId, name, minQuantity, maxQuantity, isRequired, sortOrder) 
SELECT id, 'Adicionais', 0, 5, 0, 2 FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 30001 AND name = 'X-TUDO';
